creator: evfbsd@yandex.ru
text:
> 2 June: The first RC build for the FreeBSD 11.2 release cycle is now available.
> ISO images for the amd64, armv6, arm64, i386, powerpc, powerpc64 and sparc64
> architectures are available on most of our FreeBSD mirror sites.

Current link:
https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-stable/2018-May/089053.html

Must:
https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-stable/2018-June/089053.html
